title: Add amerli chat app to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Amerli joins the hive
gist.blurb: Amerli Chat just landed in the community showcase. It's a mobile-first, Persian-language conversational AI built on our infrastructure, proving once again that the hive is global.
gist.summary: Added Amerli Chat, a responsive Persian-language conversational AI PWA, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Expands the ecosystem with a dedicated mobile-first chat interface tailored for the Persian-speaking community.
gist.visual_concept: Pollinations bee mascot (Polly) sitting on a cozy, intricate pixel-art Persian rug, looking at a glowing mobile phone screen. The phone represents the mobile-first PWA, and the rug represents the Persian language/culture connection.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot sitting on a beautiful pixelated Persian rug, looking happily at a glowing mobile phone displaying a chat interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot sitting on a beautiful pixelated Persian rug, looking happily at a glowing mobile phone displaying a chat interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
